name: Hap Seng Plantations Holdings Bhd
summary: Hap Seng Plantations Holdings Bhd is a Malaysia-based company involved in the cultivation of oil palm and the production of crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel (PK). The company manages oil palm estates and operates palm oil mills, primarily in Sabah and Sarawak, Malaysia. Hap Seng Plantations aims to be a sustainable and efficient palm oil producer.
